evidence: Paper uses random forest via the ranger package as one classifier among three tested: "The training of SVM and random forest classifiers was performed using the caret R package and utilizing the kernlab and ranger R packages, respectively." However, evaluation relies entirely on classifier performance metrics (Kappa, AUC, sensitivity, specificity) on held-out test data. No variable importance is extracted or interpreted: "We used the Kappa statistic to evaluate performance on holdout data... In addition to the Kappa statistic, we used a composite one-vs-all approach to calculate several metrics..." All conclusions concern normalization method suitability assessed via predictive performance, not feature importance.
